items.title: Respond to Barak (Opti) with round participation decision and confirm check size
items.context: Email from Richie on Jun 16: Round is ~$16M at $75-80M pre-money. Mayfield and YL Ventures committed to co-lead. Barak proposed $4M allocation for Fin; Richie recommends rightsizing to ~$2M. Team indicated they'd follow up with next steps.

items.title: Prep for Co-investment Discussion: Unstructured call with SMFL (June 19)
items.context: Calendar event 'Co-investment Discussion: Unstructured' on Jun 19 with SMFL attendees (Takeshi Fujiwara, Kazuki Kyotani, Yohei Kawana) and Fin team — co-investment strategy discussion for Series C.

items.title: Prep for SMBC AD management meeting about Fin Atlas Beyond Fund (June 24)
items.context: Calendar event on Jun 24 with 20+ attendees from SMBC, Atlas Beyond, JRI, and Fin Capital — quarterly LP management meeting requiring preparation.

items.title: Research Level.ai ahead of intro meeting with Felix Rodriguez (June 19)
items.context: Calendar event '30 Mins Meeting between Fan + Derek and Felix Rodriguez' on Jun 19 at 2pm ET — initial meeting with felix@level.ai.

items.title: Prep for meeting with Ron Blachar from Vivid Security (June 23)
items.context: Calendar event 'Jake Fuchs and Ron Blachar' on Jun 23 at 4pm ET with ron@vivid.security — intro meeting scheduled via HubSpot.
